title: Recovery
tagline: Forty days after the seal. Some of us are fine. Some of us are not fine.
hook_line: It's been forty days since they sealed the Titan Array. GRANITE hasn't moved once. RUMBLE hasn't been seen. And ELDER-7 said something this morning that nobody understood.

scenes.title: Day Forty
scenes.narration: Day forty after the Titan Array sealing. BLAZE walked through the bay doing the team check-in he'd been doing every morning since day one. GRANITE: zero mobility, cryo-sleeve at minimum function, but vitals stable. NOVA: operational. STORM: operational. ELDER-7: sitting in the northeast corner, said seven words this morning, none of them to anyone in the room.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dramatic low-angle interior shot of the Mech team bay, industrial blue and steel lighting, #1A1A2E deep background, BLAZE walking inspection route in foreground, red energy lines dim but stable, GRANITE visible in background completely motionless against the wall — cryo-sleeve dark gray and inactive, frost crystals visible, NOVA and STORM at their stations, ELDER-7 in the far northeast corner alone facing the wall, cinematic mech art style, moody and quiet

scenes.title: GRANITE at Zero
scenes.narration: The cryo-sleeve had taken everything to stop COLOSSUS's core breach. GRANITE was at zero. Not damaged — just empty. His diagnostics showed no errors. All systems present. But when BLAZE said his name, GRANITE looked at the floor for a long time before he answered. 'I'm here,' he said finally. 'I just don't know what I am yet.'
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up on GRANITE — massive mech, dark blue-gray plating, cryo-sleeve completely dim and drained, frost still on the lower joints, seated against the bay wall, head slightly bowed, BLAZE standing beside him in medium shot, GRANITE's face plates showing faint expression indicators at neutral, the empty cryo-sleeve detailed — visible crystals, zero energy glow, the space where the power was, cinematic close-up lighting, #1A1A2E and #2D4A6E, emotional weight without melodrama

scenes.title: NOVA's Log
scenes.narration: NOVA had been keeping logs since day one. Not mission logs — personal ones. She hadn't told anyone. On day thirty-seven she wrote: 'The seal held. It is holding. COLOSSUS is contained. These are facts. I check them every three hours because knowing a fact and believing it are not the same thing yet.'
scenes.visual_prompt: NOVA in her monitoring station, holographic screens around her displaying containment status readouts all showing green, she's writing in a secondary log interface — not the mission log, a personal one — the entry from day 37 visible in holographic text, her color palette warm gold and white #E94560 energy lines in calm state, multiple screens showing: SEAL STATUS: ACTIVE, CONTAINMENT: STABLE, 1,036 hours maintained — she's checking all of them again, cinematic detail shot

scenes.title: ELDER-7's Seven Words
scenes.narration: STORM had caught ELDER-7's seven words on his acoustic sensors. He replayed them once, quietly, in his corner. The words were: 'The fourth team did not disengage willingly.' STORM didn't know what it meant. He wrote it down.
scenes.visual_prompt: STORM in his corner of the bay, acoustic sensor arrays extended, displaying a waveform of seven words — the text 'THE FOURTH TEAM DID NOT DISENGAGE WILLINGLY' visible in holographic readout, STORM's expression indicators showing focused attention, ELDER-7 visible in distant corner still facing the wall, atmospheric bay lighting, #1A1A2E background, #E94560 and silver-blue for STORM's systems, the gravity of the words communicated through composition

scenes.title: The RUMBLE Question
scenes.narration: No sign of RUMBLE for forty days. BLAZE had run three scans per day. Nothing. No signal, no trace, no debris. NOVA had checked every archive record she had access to. ELDER-7 had been asked once, on day twelve. He said: 'He is working.' That was all. When BLAZE asked 'working on what?' — ELDER-7 had already stopped listening.
scenes.visual_prompt: Split-screen style composition — left: BLAZE's scan interface showing 40 days of empty RUMBLE scans, all returning NULL, scan lines sweeping across dark space — right: the RUMBLE bay space, visibly empty, the marks from his previous configurations still on the floor, ELDER-7's quote 'HE IS WORKING' displayed in simple text in center, cinematic #1A1A2E and #E94560 palette, the emptiness of RUMBLE's space feels deliberate not ominous

scenes.title: The Team Checks In
scenes.narration: At 0600 on day forty, BLAZE held the first formal team check-in since the sealing. He didn't give a speech. He just asked everyone the same question: 'What do you need?' NOVA said: 'More data.' STORM said: 'Quieter sensors.' GRANITE said nothing for a while, then said: 'Time.' ELDER-7 said: 'I need to remember something I have been avoiding remembering.' Nobody pushed him on it. Not yet.
scenes.visual_prompt: Team gathered in a loose formation in the central bay, BLAZE standing at the front, not at attention — a quieter posture than mission stance, each team member shown in a single-frame moment: NOVA with screens, STORM with extended acoustic arrays, GRANITE still against the wall but present, ELDER-7 standing apart and facing the group for the first time in days, group lighting shift — warmer than the individual scenes, first moment of team coherence, #1A1A2E to #162140 gradient, subtle #E94560 accents

scenes.title: Day Forty. Something New Begins.
scenes.narration: Somewhere outside the bay — location unknown, signal masked — RUMBLE opened a new file. He labeled it: SEASON 2 — WHAT THEY CAN DO THAT THEY DO NOT KNOW THEY CAN DO. He paused for a moment before adding the first line. Then he began.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark exterior location — unknown coordinates, signal-masked environment, distant industrial structures, RUMBLE in shadow — only his eyes and the new file interface visible, the file title 'SEASON 2 — WHAT THEY CAN DO THAT THEY DO NOT KNOW THEY CAN DO' glowing on his screen interface, cursor blinking before the first entry, #1A1A2E almost black, only the file text in #E94560 red and the eyes in cold silver-blue visible, foreboding but measured — RUMBLE is planning, not attacking, minimal composition with maximum gravity

viral_hook: It's been 40 days since they won. And they're all still trying to figure out what winning cost them.
highlight_note: STORM replaying ELDER-7's seven words: 'The fourth team did not disengage willingly.' — the first real hint of the Season 2 mythology drop.
rewatch_bait: GRANITE's 'I just don't know what I am yet' — look at the cryo-sleeve on rewatch, it's not just depleted, the crystal structure has changed. His rebuild won't restore what he was.
youtube_title: 40 days after the victory… and RUMBLE just opened a NEW FILE 📁 | Mech Legends S2 EP1
lesson: Recovery isn't going back to what you were. It's figuring out who you are now.
arc_notes: S2 OPEN. GRANITE at zero — his rebuild arc begins (resolves EP005). ELDER-7's seven words planted — 'The fourth team did not disengage willingly' — full reveal EP010. NOVA's personal log establishes she's tracking her own belief/knowledge gap. RUMBLE's SEASON 2 file opened — first test (BLAZE, phasing) begins EP002. RUMBLE is not a villain this season — he's the architect of what the team needs to become.
